_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Knowledge of cyber defense system analysis tools
reference_document_element_description: Knowledge of AI-specific attack taxonomy, including adversarial examples, model evasion, model extraction, model inversion, membership inference, data poisoning, and prompt injection.
comments: NICE knowledge intersects with WIDAI RM domain. Knowledge RM-K-005 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: RM-S-002 (RM, cosine: 0.445), SP-K-009 (SP, cosine: 0.429).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark. Both texts processed jointly through transformer; outputs calibrated 0-1 similarity score.
primary_method.significance: STS 4.7/10 (raw 0.474). Shared vocabulary: [knowledge]. NICE-only terms [analysis, cyber, defense, system, tools] vs WIDAI-only terms [adversarial, ai, attack, data, evasion, examples] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.description: Token-level contextual embedding matching. Precision = FDE coverage of KSA tokens. Recall = KSA coverage by FDE tokens. F1 = harmonic mean.
bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.858 (P=0.877, R=0.838). P exceeds R by 0.039 — the NICE element's 7 words are well-captured by the WIDAI KSA's 21 words, but the KSA contains additional specificity not reflected in the NICE element.

nli_cross_encoder.description: Natural Language Inference. Classifies text pair as entailment, neutral, or contradiction. Indicates directional implication strength.
nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: contradiction-dominant (82.1%). Despite 'Intersects with' classification, the model detects semantic tension between "Knowledge of cyber defense system analysis tools" and "Knowledge of AI-specific attack taxonomy, including adversarial examples, model". Indicates these concepts operate in adjacent but distinct professional domains — shared vocabulary, different application context.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity. Each text encoded independently; measures vector-space proximity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.450 ≈ STS 0.474 (gap 0.024). Independent encoding and cross-attention agree. Shared terms [knowledge] are sufficient for independent encoding to detect the match.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens). Purely lexical baseline, hand-traceable.
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 8.0%. Shared tokens: [knowledge]. NICE-only: [analysis, cyber, defense, system, tools]. WIDAI-only: [adversarial, ai, attack, data, evasion, examples].
